productDisplayName: Clarks Men Dark Black Un Rail Casual Shoes
description: These richly hued two-tone loafers with elasticated gussets, seams on the toe cap and a refined upraised heel from clarks are crafted with leather and fashioned to add panache to any dressy ensemble. Wear this with chinos and a polo T-shirt or a tonal suit. Upper Leather upper with slip on styling and reinforced overlay at the heel collar Elasticated gussets on the sides of the tongue Seams at the toe box Padded lining Soft sockliner for instep comfort Padded tongue Midsole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole TPR outsole with an upraised heel Terraced grooves for grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
